items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the scenario of waiting for sold-out group events, but there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates the outcome of this scenario. The expected result states that the scenario behavior should be confirmed or produce a clear failure report, yet the evidence does not include any results or traces from the simulation. This lack of evidence leads to an inconclusive status regarding the validation of the scenario.
